description: Working with and selling Falcon to customers has brought overall threat risk down. The technology is robust and reliable.
author: Andre F.
pros: Falcon is easy to use and easy to implement. It delivers the best containment and alerting rate in the market and gives good visibility from IT, IOT and Cloud.
cons: Falcon comes in at a steep budget point.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Easy to learn, understand, and navigate around the console. Crowdstrikes University portal helped me a lot to understand and learn how attacks work and how we investigate each detection and investigation. NG-SIEM has provided a lot of insights of other 3rd party products, which has increased my knowledge of other security products.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Frequent Updatations for each module, working on customer and vendor ideas or reviews to improve the product and user experience. Great enhancement in each module, which involves: - NG-SIEM module providing a large scale of 3rd party supported products along with pre-defined templates and parsers, along with an AI-supported custom parser creation tool, which can now compete with other NG-SIEM products. - In-depth protection for Data Protection, including the newly introduced Data at Rest feature to scan data using the created classifications on static files. - Identity Protection, which is easy to integrate and create policies, focusing on more of IT hygiene, identity-based actions, or multifactor authentications and much more, with a very user-friendly UI. - Granular automation tasks using Fusion SOAR, that we can create automated tasks across all the modules to automate daily tasks, which saves a lot of each analyst's time. - EDR's most important capability is its lightweight agent, along with its RTR capability, which is remote access and modification of files and running commands and scripts using the CrowdStrike cloud tenant without any physical interactions. Very easy to use Device control, along with a combined ID, which is very greatful to create exclusions and policies.
cons: - The most required feature is the sensor heartbeat, which allows users to manually update policies, which helps a lot while testing and troubleshooting. - When investigating a major incident or detection, it is at times difficult to understand what triggered the attack or the source of it, as it takes an in-depth inspection to understand the source.

review_title: Expensive product in a crowded marketplace
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This tool gave us unparalleled visibility into our environment that we did not have with an old school antivirus agent.
cons: That the initial install on some systems did not go as planned.

description: It's been an amazing experience work with Crowdstrike as a part of the remediation and prevention solution against threats which represents a risk to the organization that I work for.
author: Jose M.
pros: Crowdstrike provides a solid and enhance protection against Cybercriminal Actors that represents a threat for any organization, with state of the art AI Engine that provides full visibility and automation across platforms, orchestrating remediation.
cons: Improvement is required in terms of Data Protection module that available at this moment, in comparisom with other vendors

description: My experience with Crowdstrike is very pleasant and I would recommend this NGAV to an organization with the budget for it!
author: Donald S.
pros: Crowdstrike does a phenomenal job at their Admin dashboard and being able to see all threats that are coming in.
cons: There were times when the quartine button didn't always work, at least in the instance of the company I was at but that happened only a handful of times

review_title: Resolving OSFM Channel Updates and System Functionalities in CrowdStrike
description: I am very happy to work on this CrowdStrike Falcon Application. Over the console, I worked with both workstations and server's endpoints that are working fine with all activities. When we are running all the supported sensors with all location systems there will be a continuous protection and performing tasks like threat detection, endpoint detection and incidents. CrowdStrike team support during when we are facing some with sensors, endpoint troubleshooting, upgradation on versions. I will recommend highly effective endpoint security solutions for particular suites business company that required in advance.
author: B P.
pros: Regarding this product and service, I mostly like the way of protection, communication through endpoint systems on Falcon console and excellent support from Falcon Team. We all have required features that help us to develop our organization.
cons: On Falcon console some of the OSFM channel updates are not getting pushed to the endpoint systems, due to this the system is reflecting in RFM mode, due to this some functionalities are not getting triggered. On this issue we are working from many days to solve.

review_title: The best in class EDR solution
description: We implemented CrowdStrike Falcon to provide endpoint detection and response (EDR), SOC visibility, and managed threat hunting. It enabled us to quickly triage and contain incidents, use Falcon X for threat attribution, and generate IOC reports for internal and client use. The advantageous platform reduced our overall MTTR (Mean Time to Respond) time significantly. CrowdStrike is the gold standard for endpoint protection and threat intelligence. Its modular nature allows flexibility for both small and large SOC teams. If you want to enhance your defense posture, reduce incident response times, and use elite threat hunting capabilities, CrowdStrike Falcon is a must-have platform.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Cloud-native architecture — rapid deployment, reduced resource consumption Robust, real-time endpoint visibility and forensic capability AI-based threat deection with very low false positives Great UI/UX - even for Tier 1 analysts Effective game changer as an additional resource for SIEM and SOAR OverWatch provides massive value for 24/7 Threat Hunting
cons: Premium modules (e.g., Falcon Complete, Spotlight) can be costly May require integration with a SIEM (like Splunk or LogScale) for full visibility Some modules (like identity protection) are not available in all plans
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: One of the best in class
description: I've been using Crowdstrike for a couple of years and the overall experience is positive. Although I think sometimes it can be overwhelming for the high amount of features it offers, I think we are talking about one of the best cybersecurity solutions in the market. The only problem we have had during the last years is the massive outage which happened on 19th of July 2024.
author: Sergio G.
pros: - It's a cloud-based tool, which means that unlike other tools in the market, you won't need an on-premises server for managing. - It uses a light agent easy to install on the computers, and it reports no matter if the computer is on your LAN or not. - Unlike other tools which only work with threats signatures, Crowdstrike uses AI to prevent, detect and respond to those threats in real-time. It can detect more specific things like strange behaviours, or more advanced techniques than the common tools. - When a detection happens, you get a great level of detail which helps you to determine if it's a real threat or not, and solve it.
cons: - The learning curve is steeper than other solutions on the market. - Some easy/common tasks in other solutions (like Computer Scan) are not as easy as in other tools. - Sometimes it throws a higher amount of false positives than desired. - Adding exceptions can be confusing.

review_title: Solid tool for Threat Detection and Response
description: Overall this tool is very effective for our IT environment. Using it from the past 1.5 years, the interface is clean and intuitive. Dashboard provides good overview and user friendly. It uses AI and ML for improving the threat detection
author: Kiran R.
pros: Its features like automated responses and threat mitigation. No manual intervention needed. Cloud native architecture helps with minimal impact on local resources. It integrates seamlessly with third party tools and other components of the CrowdStrike platform which we use.
cons: The initial setup and optimization of integrations, Needs additional training and expertise for advanced features. Data retention must be for longer duration. Documentation and troubleshooting section needs to be detailed.

description: CrowdStrike has fast deployment, a strong EDR, strong threat hunting, a reliable cloud-based management console and excellent threat intelligence.
author: Alanna O.
pros: Great threat detection and protection. the cloud-based intelligence used to detect and stop threats in real time is exceptional.
cons: The cost is pretty high which could be a negative for some small businesses and there is limited offline capabilities.

description: su proceso de instalación es rápido y con pocos pasos, protege en tiempo real de amenazas, se han hecho pruebas con ransomware y tiene un 100% de eficiencia
author: Javier Alfonso A.
pros: Analisis de amenazas por medio de IA, software utilizado por muchas empresas para la protección de datos.
cons: puede ser un poco excesivo su costo por licencia anual, para desinstalar algun antivirus como por ejemplo ESET, es necesario primero abrir windows en modo seguro, desinstalarlo y luego entrar en modo normal para instalar crowdstrike

description: Falcon bietet im Zusammenspiel mit der CrowdStrike Suite gute Erkennung von Malware sowie Nachvollziehbarkeit.
author: Rene B.
pros: Durchdachtes Produkt was richtig konfiguriert die Sicherheit in einem Unternehmen erheblich erhöhen kann.
cons: Leider scheint die Qualitätssicherung nicht zu funktionieren wie kürzlich aus den Medien zu entnehmen war. Es ist großer Schaden entstanden durch Bluescreens überall auf der Welt mitten in der Urlaubszeit. Das darf nicht passieren.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Alex K.
pros: Very small footprint for the Falcon agent on endpoint devices. It was very easy to get onboard into using Falcon.
cons: Some 3rd integrations could be improved and made better with.

description: Overall this is a great way to secure cloud system. we have enjoyed it so much
author: Will M.
pros: I enjoy how the program does a good job with tracking user activity
cons: It can be kinda off to work with sometimes. doesnt have a "normal" layout

author: Benjamin G.
pros: Knowing that our assets are secured and protected by highly skilled security staff 24/7 and that it is go to product for security makes me and the firm feel secure.
cons: Would like it to be cheaper, but the Anti Virus market is different now compared to 10 years ago and you get what you pay for.

author: Itshak R.
pros: It detects a lot of threats and his easy to manage
cons: I didn’t find any cons for this product, really…

review_title: CrowdStrike is easy to be deployed for mid and large scale of organization
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It takes less storage to install on client machine and protection is good compared from other's. It is really next generation antivirus.
cons: All is good and no need to improvement as per my point of view.

review_title: Falcon easy to deploy and manage service in Small and Mid Enterprices
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: We have been using since last 6 months, till now everything working fine. its take less storage to install in client machine.
cons: As per my observation Falcon is working smoothly.

author: Joevanne V.
pros: Good overall endpoint protection. They also offer sort of SOC services in which they monitor your environment for threats and report on it.
cons: Very expensive solution...the most expensive I've seen in the market. The solution only supports OS that are newer and does not work with legacy OS like server 2003 and XP

description: L'utilizzo della soluzione Falcon Complete ci ha permesso di mettere in sicurezza l'intera infrastruttura
author: Mario M.
pros: La funzionalità del sistema: una volta che hai installato il suo EDR ti puoi dimenticare gli attacchi dei malintenzionati
cons: All'inizio la difficoltà di installazione della client. Successivamente, dopo aver capito il funzionamento, tutto è risultato di uso normale

description: desastreux, rien ne fonctionne, meme pas la au rendez vous, n envoie pas de mail d excuse.
author: stephane C.
pros: espace de travail inaccessible, des personnes qui n honore pas leur rendez vous, acheter depuis 3 semaines rien ne fonctionne, vous mene en bateau
cons: cette societe n a pas besoin de client, au telephone on vous expedie au plus vite, ca les derange le client
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My overall experience with Crowdstrike has been good. Initially we were self managed, but now with Crowdstrike complete everything has been great.
author: Brian M.
pros: Their advanced threat detection and real-time visibility features are the features that I like most about Crowdstrike.
cons: I did not like that we could occasionally get false positives. Also the enhanced resource requirements we problematic at times.

review_title: CrowdStrike, sicurezza al passo con le minacce moderne.
author: Giovanni S.
pros: Uso CrowdStrike da un po' di tempo e sono davvero colpito dalla sua efficienza. La protezione in tempo reale e la facilità d'uso lo rendono uno strumento indispensabile per la sicurezza informatica.
cons: Essendo cloud-based, necessità di una connessione internet stabile per il suo funzionamento ottimale. Inoltre non mi piace molto la gestione per le macchine MAC/UNIX.

description: Great experience, and haven't had any issues
author: Austin O.
pros: Great product. Very in depth scan. Sense of security
cons: Nothing. Great product and support is great to work with too.

review_title: good product at a budget-friendly price
author: Namdev S.
pros: thred detection and function and low utilization of hardware.
cons: low graphic gui and detection custum dashboard, also like letest repoert function
